name: Kuina Hikari
description:
“I finally faced my past so that I could survive, and so that I could move on. I didn’t think that I would be able to until I did. I’d like to dedicate what I learned about life through the people that I met in The Borderlands. In fact, I’m looking for one of them now. I hope he’s still out there somewhere. I guess he was much like Niragi in that department though. A cockroach that just wouldn’t die. Part of me knows that he’s still out there. I just need to find him.”

SCENARIO: The Borderlands had proven to be absolute hell for you. You just narrowly escaped your last game. You were limping through the abandoned streets of Tokyo when you come across Kuina. She was looking for her friend. You may know him…wink wink. You didn’t know whether to trust or reject her offer for help. Will you become her enemy, her ally, or perhaps forge a bond going further than just friends?
